name: Rokid SmartLife
summary: Local life and POI navigation app with D-pad control for Rokid AI glasses
description: Rokid SmartLife is a local life and POI navigation assistant designed for easy D-pad use on Rokid AI glasses. It helps users search points of interest and navigate efficiently.
author: bcefghj

listing.descriptionMarkdown:
## About
Rokid SmartLife is a local life and POI navigation app tailored for Rokid AI glasses, featuring D-pad control for seamless interaction.

## Key features
- Search points of interest (POI) across 12 categories
- Navigation assistance for local life needs
- Designed specifically for Rokid AI glasses with D-pad control

## How it works
Users navigate through local POIs and access navigation features using the glasses' D-pad, enabling hands-free, convenient operation.
